{{Infobox character
| name = Outsider
| aliases = The Outsider
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Outsider, also identified as Ozriel, is a being from a distant world who exists beyond the borders of the known realm. Described as a human figure, he has been seen appearing in black clothing or drifting through the void. He is considered a significant threat to existence, with intentions to destroy everything, including the entire prison-world. His presence is associated with a shadow that resembles a mass of twisting serpents and he has been known to engage in incomprehensible battles against [[Great Elders]] like [[Urg’naut]] within the void. While some view him as a potential source of salvation, he is generally regarded as an enemy who is not a friend to the inhabitants of this world.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Outsider]] is a threat that could destroy everything.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Urg'naut stated the time has come to do battle with the [[Outsider]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] and Jorin had not believed in the [[Outsider]] before being faced with him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Outsider]] is fighting [[Urg’naut]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Outsider]] plans to blow up the prison-world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We can save no more of you. The time has come to do battle with the Outsider.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
